title: How Getting Paid in USDT for Digital Work Works and How to Set It Up Today for Digital Creators
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, struggling to get paid through PayPal due to restrictions that leave you with delayed or lost funds. You need a USDT payment solution that lets you receive cryptocurrency directly, no middlemen needed. In this guide, we'll show you how to set up a USDT payment system for your digital products, and start selling without any more delays. Let's get started.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The USDT payment method is a game-changer for creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya. With NOWPayments, you can receive USDT directly into your wallet, without any payment processor account required. This means instant payment verification, automated delivery, and no more delayed or lost funds. You can sell your ebooks, courses, and digital products without worrying about getting paid.
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your USDT payment system, you'll need a few things. First, sign up for a NOWPayments account, which is free and requires no KYC. Next, purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, which costs $19.99 and lets you generate multi-chain QR codes for live price feeds. Finally, grab the Core Shop Engine, which is $49.99 and handles automated delivery and payment verification.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Now it's time to set up your payment and delivery pipeline. Start by integrating your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with your Core Shop Engine backend. This will let you generate multi-chain QR codes for live price feeds and automate delivery and payment verification. Next, configure your payment settings to accept USDT payments. Finally, test your payment system to make sure everything is working smoothly.
USDT payments are instant and secure with NOWPayments.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

You're almost ready to go live. First, configure your Admin Dashboard to track transactions and orders. Next, test your payment system with a dummy sale to make sure everything is working smoothly. Finally, go live and start selling your digital products. Use your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend to generate multi-chain QR codes and let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Now that you're making sales, it's time to scale your business. Start by monitoring your transaction logs and order management in your Admin Dashboard. Next, use your real-time analytics to optimize your marketing and sales strategies. Finally, consider upgrading to the Full Stack Bundle, which includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide to help you take your business to the next level.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
You can receive USDT payments directly into your wallet without any payment processor account required.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're struggling to get paid through PayPal or other payment processors, you're not alone. Many digital creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya face similar challenges. That's why we've developed the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, which lets you generate multi-chain QR codes for live price feeds and accept payments in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. Check out our Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it works.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your USDT payment system, follow these steps: Sign up for a NOWPayments account and purchase the Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration. Integrate your Web3 Wallet Connect frontend with your Core Shop Engine backend. Configure your payment settings to accept USDT payments. Test your payment system with a dummy sale. Go live and start selling your digital products. Monitor your transaction logs and order management in your Admin Dashboard.
With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can generate multi-chain QR codes for live price feeds and accept payments in 300+ coins.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
